message:
test(fnp-python): add 5 new metamorphic tests

- divmod_invariant: a == q * b + r
- reciprocal_product_is_one: x * reciprocal(x) == 1
- expm1_log1p_roundtrip: log1p(expm1(x)) == x
- deg2rad_rad2deg_roundtrip: rad2deg(deg2rad(x)) == x
- clip_equals_min_max_composition: clip == min(max(x, lo), hi)

Total metamorphic tests: 25

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
